Tier: Score 3: Within 10% of Numbeo — Gemini is solid
Score 2: Within 25% — usable with approximate disclaimer
Score 1: Off by 25-50% — needs heavy caveat
Score 0: Way off or hallucinated — cannot show this
N/A: Numbeo has no data either — both blind
1. For each city row ask Gemini (via app companion chat in resident mode) the category question
2. Record Gemini answer in local currency
3. Check numbeo.com (free website no API needed) for the same data point
- Tier A avg 2+ across categories: Gemini ships confidently with AI estimate badges
- Tier B avg 2+: international coverage is solid
- Tier C: your personal relocation cities — the ones that matter most to YOU
- Tier D N/A count: how many cities have NO reliable source — where honest redirect kicks in
- Any category consistently scoring 0-1: needs heavier disclaimer or exclude from Phase 1a
- D12 Visa: hardest to verify numerically — check factual accuracy of requirements not numbers
- D6/D9/D21: qualitative — score based on whether Gemini response is helpful and non-misleading not exact match
